resources.string: Your phone is locked. Contact retailer to unlock the fun!
अरे! आपका फोन लॉक हो गया है! रिटेलर से संपर्क करें और इसे अनलॉक करें!
BSNLock uses Accessibility to protect this device from unauthorized tampering with app settings, factory reset, or uninstallation while the device is under EMI protection.
